# Whistle AI

> AI-powered export management platform for Korean manufacturers and global buyers

## About
Whistle AI is a comprehensive export trade platform built by MOTIVE Innovation. It connects Korean manufacturers with global buyers through AI-driven market analysis, HS code classification, FTA benefit calculations, export document automation, cost simulation, and escrow payment protection. Founded in 2026.

## Company
- Korea: MOTIVE Innovation Inc. (모티브이노베이션)
- US: MOTIVE Global, Inc. (Delaware C-Corp)
- Industry: B2B SaaS, International Trade, AI/ML
- Contact: creative@mo-tive.com
- Website: https://whistle-ai.com
- Founded: 2026

## Key Features
- AI Export Analysis: 13-section comprehensive export market analysis with real data
- HS Code Classifier: AI-powered harmonized system code lookup and classification
- FTA Calculator: Free trade agreement benefit simulation and duty savings
- Export Cost Simulator: Comprehensive export cost estimation (FOB, CIF, DDP)
- Document Automation: PI, CI, PL, CO + 14 more export document types auto-generated
- Buyer-Manufacturer Matching: Direct connection marketplace for global trade
- Escrow Payments via Stripe: Secure payment protection with 3-stage fund release
- Deal Room: Real-time negotiation and project management
- Korean Trend Search: Real-time trending product data from Korean marketplaces
- Certification Guidance: FDA, CE, HALAL, ISO step-by-step guidance
- Alibaba Store Optimization: AI-powered product listing optimization

## Target Users
- Korean manufacturers seeking global markets
- Global buyers sourcing Korean products (K-Beauty, K-Food, K-Tech, K-Fashion)
- Export voucher beneficiary companies
- Export consultants and trade agencies

## Pricing
- Free: 1 AI analysis + 3 product registrations
- Starter: $99/month (20 AI analyses per month)
- Professional: $199/month (50 AI analyses per month)
- Enterprise: $449/month (unlimited AI analyses + priority support)
- Single Analysis: 13,900 KRW one-time
- Buyer accounts: 100% free

## URLs
- Main: https://whistle-ai.com
- Korean Landing: https://whistle-ai.com/ko
- English Landing: https://whistle-ai.com/en/
- Buyer Landing (Korean): https://whistle-ai.com/buyer
- Global Buyer Landing: https://whistle-ai.com/global-buyer/
- Manufacturer App: https://whistle-ai.com/app
- Buyer App: https://whistle-ai.com/app/buyer
- Terms (EN): https://whistle-ai.com/terms/en
- Privacy (EN): https://whistle-ai.com/privacy/en
- Refund (EN): https://whistle-ai.com/refund/en

## Technical
- Stack: Vanilla JS SPA, Supabase (Auth + RLS + Realtime + Edge Functions), Stripe, Cloudflare Pages
- AI Models: Claude (Anthropic) for analysis, classification, and document generation
- Security: Row-Level Security on all database tables, HTTPS everywhere
- Payments: Stripe Live mode with escrow (manual capture)
